stocks.impact_theory: Planet Labs surged 30%+ on reports of increased contracts for satellite imagery amid the escalating US-Israel-Iran war, providing real-time intel on troop movements and infrastructure. Economically, boosts defense spending; psychologically, fear-driven demand for surveillance tech mirrors post-9/11 defense boom. Historical parallel: 2022 Ukraine war spiked geospatial stocks 50-100%. Analogies: Like radar stocks in WWII; weather satellites during hurricanes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment positive on war relevance (posts mentioning PL with YSS), web news shows PT raises and pops; broader market down but defense/space resilient.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on continued war escalation; target $42.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, potential 5% loss if de-escalation.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical resolution, competition from gov satellites, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Strong volume surge, direct tie to current Iran conflict news, historical precedents solid.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 earnings showed 52% revenue growth to $386M, FY26 guide $545-595M despite below est; war boosts satellite constellation demand. Econ: accelerates space economy; psych: safety in defense plays. Parallel: SpaceX suppliers up 200% post-Ukraine. Analogies: Shipbuilders in WWII; drone makers in recent conflicts.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat margins, X mentions with PL; war amplifies defense spending per news.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short post-earnings fade for 4-7% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Guidance miss reaction, budget cuts, execution delays.

stocks.justification: Earnings positive but guide cautious; war tailwind strong.

stocks.impact_theory: 19% surge on continued AI chip demand, new highs after massive YTD run; war indirectly boosts semis via compute for intel. Econ: supply chain resilience; psych: FOMO on multi-baggers. Parallel: 2020 semi boom. Analogies: Pickaxes in gold rush; fiber optics in dotcom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Trending on news, X chatter; resilient amid market selloff.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Insider selling, valuation bubble, cycle downturn.

stocks.impact_theory: 17% jump on new BCD power tech launch and 52w high; benefits from auto/defense chips amid war. Econ: specialty semis premium; psych: acquisition rumors. Parallel: Intel foundry deals. Analogies: Foundry in chip wars; engines in auto boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Product news, X volume; semi sector rotation.

stocks.justification: Specific catalyst, but broader semi volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil stocks rally as Iran war enters week 3, supply fears push crude +20%; inflation spike hits broader market. Econ: higher energy prices fuel inflation; psych: safe haven in commodities. Parallel: 2022 Ukraine oil surge. Analogies: Gas masks in pandemics; canned goods in recessions.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Ubiquitous news on oil/Iran, positive energy sentiment despite X focus on tech.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick war end, recession demand drop, regulation.
